allow: PowerShell($process = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Get-Process -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($process\) { Write-Host "Matando proceso PID: $\($process.Id\)"; Stop-Process -Id $process.Id -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 } else { Write-Host "Ningún proceso en puerto 3000" }; npm start)

PowerShell(Write-Host "Buscando todos los procesos Node.js..." ; Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "Matando Node.js PID: $\($_.Id\)"; Stop-Process -Id $_.Id -Force }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; npm start)

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 32364 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Get-Process -Id 32364 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "Proceso aún activo, reintentando..."; taskkill /F /PID 32364 2>$null }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; npm start)

PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\Juanes\\Documents\\GitHub\\Nomina_2026_Alpha"; Write-Host "Eliminando procesos Node antiguos..." -ForegroundColor Yellow; Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Id -ne $PID } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Write-Host "Iniciando servidor con nuevo sistema de reintentos..." -ForegroundColor Green; npm start)
